creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 230055
grafana8.diff

Update to 8.3

Changelog: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/whatsnew/whats-new-in-v8-3/

Update to 8.3.2 with moderate severity security fix ( https://grafana.com/blog/2021/12/10/grafana-8.3.2-and-7.5.12-released-with-moderate-severity-security-fix/ )

Breaking changes ( https://github.com/grafana/grafana/blob/v8.3.2/CHANGELOG.md )
* Grafana 8 Alerting enabled by default for installations that do not use legacy alerting
* Keep Last State for "If execution error or timeout" when upgrading to Grafana 8 alerting
